info.name: FilantropiaSolar
info.summary: Advanced Solar Energy Analysis for PV Installations
info.description:
# FilantropiaSolar
A comprehensive solar energy prediction and analysis platform for photovoltaic installations.
## Features
- **Interactive Map View**: Geographic visualization of all PV installations with golden markers - **Energy Analysis**: 24-hour production/consumption charts with weather correlation - **ML Predictions**: Machine learning-powered energy forecasts using ensemble models - **Savings Calculator**: Track cost savings vs grid electricity prices - **Multi-Installation Support**: Manage multiple PV systems in one dashboard - **Weather Data Toggle**: Customizable chart layers for temperature, cloud cover, humidity, wind speed - **Virtual Installations**: Create and simulate custom PV installations at any location
## Data Source
Photovoltaic Power Production Dataset by Sarmas et al. (Mendeley Data, 2025)
## Brand
Golden olive color palette (#A89D3F, #C4B552, #D4C563) with warm cream backgrounds.
info.author: WeRa Global Team
